prompt: {"type":"hand-drawn educational infographic illustration","style":"cute notebook doodle style, hand-painted handbook aesthetic, warm beige paper background with faint texture, playful sketchy outlines, soft pastel colors, small flower and star doodles, taped paper-card layout","aspect_ratio":"wide horizontal","subject":{"characters":[{"name":"{argument name=\"dog character name\" default=\"柴小七\"}","species":"Shiba Inu mascot","appearance":"cute orange-brown Shiba Inu with cream muzzle and belly, round face, upright ears, friendly expression, simplified cartoon anatomy"},{"name":"{argument name=\"blue character name\" default=\"Token\"}","species":"blue token mascot","appearance":"rounded triangular blue droplet-shaped character with glossy gradient body, tiny arms and legs, rosy cheeks, smiling face, the word \"{argument name=\"token label\" default=\"TOKEN\"}\" written across the body in white"}],"theme":"compare four levels of text segmentation in a friendly science-explainer format"},"layout":{"sections":[{"title":"1.词级分词","position":"far left panel","count":1,"subtitle":"按完整语义划分","scene":"the Shiba Inu and blue token character stand beside a basket labeled \"Tokens\" filled with paper strips. Visible strips and tags read \"程序员\", \"Left\", \"人工智能\", and a small sign reads \"程序员Left\". The token character points toward the basket while the dog presents the categorized pieces."},{"title":"2.字符级分词","position":"left-center panel","count":1,"subtitle":"逐字切分文本","scene":"the blue token character holds a magnifying glass and examines scattered small character tiles on the floor while the Shiba Inu sorts them. A label strip at the bottom reads \"程序员Left人工智能\" as one continuous text sample being split into individual characters."},{"title":"3.子词分词","position":"right-center panel","count":1,"subtitle":"按词根及前后缀划分","scene":"the Shiba Inu gestures at a flowchart board showing broken word parts and arrows, while the blue token mascot stands nearby. Small paper labels include mixed chunks such as \"程序\", \"员\", \"Left\", \"人工\", and \"智能\", emphasizing morpheme or subword grouping."},{"title":"4.字节级分词","position":"far right panel","count":1,"subtitle":"转换为字节编码组合划分","scene":"the Shiba Inu uses a retro computer with a long printed strip emerging from it, and the blue token character stands to the side. Across the lower half are ribbon-like strips filled with repeated byte numbers and symbols, especially \"1\", \"2\", \"3\", \"4\", and \"-3\", illustrating byte encoding combinations."}],"decorations":{"count":10,"items":["4 pieces of taped corners in pale yellow and pink","small five-point stars scattered around panels","tiny flower doodles between panels","curved motion lines near character gestures","notebook-style vertical panel dividers","rounded rectangular panel frames","light shadows behind paper panels","faint horizontal paper grain","small spark icons","hand-drawn accent marks"]}},"composition":"four equal vertical panels arranged left to right across one canvas, each panel with a bold numbered Chinese heading and a smaller subtitle beneath it, each panel showing the two mascots acting out a different tokenization concept","text":{"headings":["1.词级分词","2.字符级分词","3.子词分词","4.字节级分词"],"subtitles":["按完整语义划分","逐字切分文本","按词根及前后缀划分","转换为字节编码组合划分"]},"quality":"clean, polished, adorable, presentation-ready educational visual","use_case":"social media science explainer comparing tokenization methods for AI and NLP"}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"手绘教育信息图插画","style":"可爱的笔记本涂鸦风格，手绘手册美学，温暖的米色纸张背景带有淡淡纹理，俏皮的草图轮廓，柔和的马卡龙色调，点缀小花和星星涂鸦，纸卡贴纸布局","aspect_ratio":"宽横幅","subject":{"characters":[{"name":"{argument name=\"dog character name\" default=\"柴小七\"}","species":"柴犬吉祥物","appearance":"可爱的橘棕色柴犬，带有奶油色的口鼻部和腹部，圆脸，竖耳，表情友好，简化的卡通解剖结构"},{"name":"{argument name=\"blue character name\" default=\"Token\"}","species":"蓝色 Token 吉祥物","appearance":"圆润的三角形蓝色水滴状角色，带有光泽的渐变身体，细小的四肢，红润的脸颊，微笑的表情，身体上写着 \"{argument name=\"token label\" default=\"TOKEN\"}\" 字样"}],"theme":"以友好的科学科普形式对比四种文本切分层级"},"layout":{"sections":[{"title":"1.词级分词","position":"最左侧面板","count":1,"subtitle":"按完整语义划分","scene":"柴犬和蓝色 Token 角色站在一个标有 \"Tokens\" 的篮子旁，篮子里装满了纸条。可见的纸条和标签上写着 \"程序员\", \"Left\", \"人工智能\"，旁边的小牌子上写着 \"程序员Left\"。Token 角色指向篮子，而柴犬展示分类好的碎片。"},{"title":"2.字符级分词","position":"左中面板","count":1,"subtitle":"逐字切分文本","scene":"蓝色 Token 角色拿着放大镜检查地板上散落的小字符块，柴犬在旁边进行整理。底部的标签条上写着 \"程序员Left人工智能\"，作为被拆分为单个字符的连续文本样本。"},{"title":"3.子词分词","position":"右中面板","count":1,"subtitle":"按词根及前后缀划分","scene":"柴犬对着一个展示词根拆分和箭头的项目指指点点，蓝色 Token 吉祥物站在旁边。小纸标签上包含混合片段，如 \"程序\", \"员\", \"Left\", \"人工\", \"智能\"，强调语素或子词分组。"},{"title":"4.字节级分词","position":"最右侧面板","count":1,"subtitle":"转换为字节编码组合划分","scene":"柴犬使用一台复古电脑，电脑中吐出一条长长的打印纸带，蓝色 Token 角色站在一旁。下半部分布满了丝带状的条带，上面填满了重复的字节数字和符号，特别是 \"1\", \"2\", \"3\", \"4\" 和 \"-3\"，用以说明字节编码组合。"}],"decorations":{"count":10,"items":["4 个淡黄色和粉色的胶带边角","面板周围散布的小五角星","面板之间的小花涂鸦","角色动作附近的弧形动效线","笔记本风格的垂直面板分隔线","圆角矩形面板框","纸质面板后的浅阴影","淡淡的水平纸张纹理","小火花图标","手绘强调标记"]}},"composition":"四个相等的垂直面板从左到右横跨整个画布，每个面板都有一个醒目的中文数字标题和下方的副标题，每个面板展示两个吉祥物演绎不同的分词概念","text":{"headings":["1.词级分词","2.字符级分词","3.子词分词","4.字节级分词"],"subtitles":["按完整语义划分","逐字切分文本","按词根及前后缀划分","转换为字节编码组合划分"]},"quality":"干净、精致、可爱、适合演示的教育视觉效果","use_case":"社交媒体科学科普，对比 AI 和 NLP 的分词方法"}

breakdown.creativeCore: 可爱的四格分词科普信息图：此提示词可生成一张宽幅手绘信息图，通过两个吉祥物角色讲解四种分词方法，非常适合用于 AI 和 NLP 相关的社交媒体科普帖。
breakdown.subject: 信息结构
breakdown.bestUse: 知识卡片、科普图、社媒长图、教学材料

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 信息图/图解 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: vertical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: retro, hand-drawn]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
